products.name: Classic Silk Wrap Dress
products.description: A timeless wrap dress crafted from premium silk, featuring a delicate floral print and a flattering tie-waist.

products.name: Linen Tailored Blazer
products.description: Breathable linen blazer with a relaxed yet tailored fit, perfect for summer office wear or casual outings.

products.name: High-Waist Cotton Cargo Pants
products.description: Comfortable cotton cargo pants with multiple pockets and a high-rise waist for a modern utility look.

products.name: Cashmere Turtleneck Sweater
products.description: Ultra-soft cashmere sweater featuring a cozy turtleneck and ribbed cuffs. A luxury essential for cold days.

products.name: Satin Evening Gown
products.description: Elegant satin evening gown with a cowl neck and side slit. Perfect for formal events.

products.name: Oversized Wool Coat
products.description: Cozy oversized wool coat with large lapels and deep pockets. Ideal for winter layering.

products.name: Pleated Midi Skirt
products.description: Flowy pleated midi skirt with an elastic waistband. Versatile for both work and weekend.

products.name: Ribbed Knit Cardigan
products.description: Soft ribbed knit cardigan with button-front closure. A seasonal layering staple.
